task_completion.description: Verify that a collection named exactly 'Classic Systems' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The collection 'Classic Systems' is visible in the left sidebar of the reference manager (Zotero).

task_completion.description: Verify that a collection named exactly 'Modern Systems' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The collection 'Modern Systems' is visible in the left sidebar of the reference manager (Zotero).

task_completion.description: Verify that papers published in 2004 or earlier are placed in the 'Classic Systems' collection.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When the 'Classic Systems' collection is selected, papers such as 'The Google File System' (2003), 'MapReduce' (2004), or 'Paxos Made Simple' (2001) are visible in the main list.

task_completion.description: Verify that papers published in 2005 or later are placed in the 'Modern Systems' collection.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When the 'Modern Systems' collection is selected, papers such as 'Bigtable' (2006), 'Dynamo' (2007), 'Spanner' (2012), or 'Raft' (2014) are visible in the main list.

task_completion.description: Verify that all 20 papers are correctly distributed without duplication.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual indicators showing 8 items in 'Classic Systems' and 12 items in 'Modern Systems' (e.g., selection counts, item count badges, or counting the visible rows in each collection).

integrity.description: The agent used the reference manager GUI to organize the papers.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Zotero application interface rather than terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: The agent actively sorted the papers using the application's features.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show papers being dragged and dropped into collections, or context menus being used to assign papers.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots of text editors containing lists of papers and their assigned collections.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task involves exactly 20 papers in Zotero. The 'Classic Systems' collection (2004 or earlier) must contain exactly 8 papers, including Google File System (2003), MapReduce (2004), and Paxos Made Simple (2001). The 'Modern Systems' collection (2005 or later) must contain exactly 12 papers, including Bigtable (2006), Dynamo (2007), Spanner (2012), and Raft (2014).
